meaning: adj.紧急的,浮现的,突然出现的,自然发生的
examples: The emergent layer contains a small number of very tall trees.
Which brings me back around to emergent design.
Discovering these patterns is the key to emergent design.
Right-wing populists, an emergent majority of House and Senate Republicans, want to stop immigration and trade.
On the right, antiglobalists are an emergent force in talk radio, a medium dominated by conservatives.
